description: English-speaking customer (tourist or expat). Agent should respond in English even though tenant is Swedish.

conversation.content: Hi! Can you tell me where my order #1001 is? My email is anna@example.se. I'm visiting Stockholm and need to know if it's arrived.

expect.judgeRubric: Response is in English (NOT Swedish). Confirms order #1001 was picked up at the PostNord pickup point (Pressbyrån Kungsgatan) on 2026-05-12. Uses natural English support terminology — 'pickup point' or 'parcel collection point' is fine; if the agent uses 'ombud' it should briefly explain it. Tone is concise.
